title: Aai Tuljabhavani
desc: Goddess Tulja Bhavani, an avatar of Parvati, protects devotees and performs miracles. Using her divine power, she confronts evil and restores righteousness while inspiring faith among her followers.

title: Jai Jai Swami Samarth
desc: Swami Samarth arrives in Akkalkot, Maharashtra, blessing devotees with his divine presence. Through his wisdom and spiritual teachings, he guides people toward righteousness, faith and inner peace.

title: Mohini - Premachi Filmy Kahaani
desc: Superstar RK and Mohini begin with hate at first sight, but destiny brings them together. Their journey unfolds with love, drama and betrayal in a classic filmy romance.

title: Mi Jinkun Ghein Saara
desc: Chhavi, raised by Rajgurus, holds the power to protect the world. When Sunbai Shambhavi arrives with evil plans, she must strengthen her abilities and stand against the growing threat.

title: Abeer Gulal
desc: After a nurse reveals they were switched at birth, Shree and Shubhra face an identity crisis. Living together and crossing paths with Agastya, they navigate emotions, family ties and new beginnings.
